title: New features webinar on May 22nd in the monday mansion!
excerpt:

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Join us next Wednesday, May 22nd, at 11am EST, for our monthly new features webinar, this time taking place for the first time in the monday mansion!

Explore all of the interactive content available in the mansion room, including information about the areas of the platform which have had a lot of releases lately: monday AI, and Workforms, plus get to know Work Canvas.

Then, watch the live demo together with the other llamas and have your questions answered by our specialists!

Register via the Zoom link here: Webinar Registration - Zoom

Here’s a sneak peek of the mansion:

image (15)2111×1096 376 KB
